sbp_1.note: Normal systolic blood pressure threshold <120 mmHg.

sbp_2.note: Normal systolic blood pressure threshold <120 mmHg.

sbp_3.note: Normal systolic blood pressure threshold <120 mmHg.

dbp_1.note: Normal diastolic blood pressure threshold <80 mmHg.

ferritin_ng_ml.source_label: CDC Nutrition Report and WHO ferritin guidance
ferritin_ng_ml.note: Premenopausal vs postmenopausal female split approximated with age 50 because menopause status is not consistently available.

serum_iron_ug_dl.note: Sex-specific adult serum iron reference intervals.

serum_creatinine_mg_dl.note: Adult sex-specific reference intervals; dataset age range is 18-65 so elderly rule is not used here.

alt_u_l.note: Lab upper-limit reference intervals used for transform.

total_bilirubin_mg_dl.note: General adult total bilirubin reference interval.

LBXSATSI_alanine_aminotransferase_alt_u_.note: Lab upper-limit reference intervals used for transform.

LBXSCR_creatinine_refrigerated_serum_mg_.note: Adult sex-specific reference intervals; dataset age range is 18-65 so elderly rule is not used here.

LBXSIR_iron_refrigerated_serum_ug_dl.note: Sex-specific adult serum iron reference intervals.

LBXSTB_total_bilirubin_mg_dl.note: General adult total bilirubin reference interval.

LBXWBCSI_white_blood_cell_count_1000_cel.note: Adult clinical reference interval; not NHANES-specific.

LBXPLTSI_platelet_count_1000_cells_ul.note: Sex- and age-specific platelet intervals summarized from NHANES III findings.

LBXFER_ferritin_ng_ml.source_label: CDC Nutrition Report and WHO ferritin guidance
